options.name: -bumps
options.description: specifies the bumps to be deleted ((bump)+, optional)

options.name: -floating
options.description: Deletes bumps which are not assigned to any nets

options.name: -overlap_areaio
options.description: deletes all bumps that overlap the area I/O cells

options.name: -overlap_blockages
options.description: deletes all bumps that overlap routing blockages

options.name: -overlap_keepout
options.description: Deletes specified bumps overlapping bump keep out zone

options.name: -overlap_macro
options.description: deletes all bumps that overlap the selected macros
